Test Case Description: Holistic Factual Correctness - Leadership: Verify key executive fields (CEO Name, Key Business Leaders) against external professional networks (LinkedIn) and company website.
Expected Result: Leadership data must match current LinkedIn profiles and official About Us pages. (Ref: CEO Name 'Highest authority point of contact'; Key Business Leaders 'Required for enterprise B2B mapping')

Test Case Description: Holistic Factual Correctness - Financials: Verify financial fields (Annual Revenues, Total Funding Amount, Recent Funding Rounds) against regulatory filings (SEC) and financial databases (Pitchbook/Crunchbase).
Expected Result: Financial figures must match the latest available 10-K/10-Q filings or validated investor reports. (Ref: Annual Revenues 'Matches SEC/Pitchbook'; Total Capital Raised 'Matches SEC/Crunchbase')

Test Case Description: Holistic Factual Correctness - Operational Scale: Verify operational metrics (Employee Size, Company Headquarters, Office Locations) against company registry and workforce platforms (Crunchbase, Glassdoor).
Expected Result: Operational data must align with third-party verification sources. (Ref: Employee Size 'Includes FTEs'; Company Headquarters 'Must match official government registration')
